title: Projects
content: Projects # \(\) Research on multi-frequency mixed signal decomposition method | Bachelor Thesis, Sep. 2020 – Jun. 2021 # Part of a state-level topic in China and supervised by Prof. Dongmei Fu, Bio-inspired computing Lab, Beijing Proposed a signal decomposition algorithm based on variational method which is scene adaptive on non-stationary signal and has higher accuracy compared with EMD, VMD in analysis of ECG signals and bearing signals Analysed the signals and trends of corrosive atmospheric components ( \(Cl^{-}, SO_2\) ) around mainland China based on galvanic corrosion data collected by observation stations of State Grid Corporation of China (SGCC) Programmed a signal decomposition and feature extraction toolbox (Copyright Registration: No.2021SR0872462) Awarded the outstanding undergraduate thesis

title: About
content: About9 # Hi, this is my personal website. Welcome to contact me.

title: Demonstrations
content:
Demonstrations # Wigner Semi-circle Law # A combinatorial proof and simulations of Wigner’s semicircle law, presented by Andjela Todorovic and me.
An animation of our simulation, shows the convergence of the empirical spectral distribution of a random matrix.
